penalties.description: The marked circle was not fully freed from the gauze by the maximum time limit.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion status. Claude reported timeout at 300 seconds with incomplete circle, while GPT reported completion at 120 seconds. Given the fundamental nature of this disagreement and the automatic-zero condition for incomplete tasks, Claude's assessment takes priority as it provides specific evidence of the circle remaining attached at timeout.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's timeout assessment is more consistent with the incomplete_circle penalty and provides specific evidence of task incompletion at maximum time.

claude_value.description: The marked circle was not fully freed from the gauze by the maximum time limit.

gpt_value.description: The cut deviated outside the marked circle in several places.

disagreements.rationale: Incomplete task is an automatic-zero condition that supersedes line deviation penalties. Claude's assessment of timeout with incomplete circle is more definitive.
If the circle was not fully freed as Claude assessed, then circle_release phase was not completed.
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score regardless of time or other penalties.
